chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-83 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh. ----- None present for the Petitioner. Matter pertains to Bid Process and the Payer is that the Tender be cancelled. Parawise comments state that the entire Bid Process was recorded and Petitioner did not participate in the same. Consequently, this Petition has become infructuous, therefore, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
